race.comment: MISS MERCY (9) comes back in grade for this with a few key gear changes. Sat on the fast tempo from the wide gate with a tenacious sixth over 1000m at Tamworth. Best form is over this trip and assess on the slick win three-back. NORTHERN BOOGIE (12) deep into the campaign and holding his form. Savaged the line from last on the turn with a game third over 1000m at Quirindi. Doesn't have to improve much to finish over the top of these. BOOM BREAK (2) racing better than his last two runs suggest on the rain-affected tracks. Gripped on with the 59.5kg when a close-up sixth over 1000m at Coffs Harbour. Top-four player on the firmer track. LORD SEYMOUR (7) back in grade and trip with a game Maiden victory over 800m at Coffs Harbour. Can get over from the gate and has minor place claims.
